examples: Ciliv is selling the efficacy of so-called build-operate-transfer (BOT) operations.
The emerging system through which private companies maintain toll roads in some states is a classic BOT model.
Every time Funny Bot throws out a catch phrase ("Oh Lawd, this chicken sho' is hot!"), someone hands him a dollar.
With multisensory environmental awareness, the 32-inch bot can hear, see and sense those around it.
You can transmit your voice through the bot, and control an LED light to convey mood.
